mapper.select: /* com.shop.mapper.biz.Mis.selectCategoryViewList */ SELECT PC.ID AS categoryId , PC.CODE_NM AS categoryNm , COALESCE(SUM(OI_AGG.totalPaymentAmt), 0) AS totalPaymentAmt , COALESCE(SUM(OI_AGG.purchaseCnt), 0) AS purchaseCnt , COALESCE(SUM(C_AGG.cartCnt), 0) AS cartCnt , COALESCE(SUM(PVL_AGG.pageViewCnt), 0) AS pageViewCnt , ROUND(( COALESCE(SUM(OI_AGG.purchaseCnt), 0) * 100 + COALESCE(SUM(C_AGG.cartCnt), 0) * 30 + COALESCE(SUM(PVL_AGG.pageViewCnt), 0) * 5) / 100.0, 2) AS totalScore FROM TB_PARTNER_CODE PC JOIN TB_CATEGORY_PRODUCT CP ON CP.CATEGORY_ID = PC.ID AND CP.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT OI.PRODUCT_ID , SUM(OI.PAYMENT_AMOUNT) AS totalPaymentAmt , COUNT(OI.ID) AS purchaseCnt FROM TB_ORDER_ITEM OI JOIN TB_ORDER O ON O.ID = OI.ORDER_ID AND O.ORDER_STATUS IN ('O','P','R','S','D') AND O.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} WHERE OI.CRE_TM >= #{fromDate} AND OI.CRE_TM < #{toDate} GROUP BY OI.PRODUCT_ID ) OI_AGG ON OI_AGG.PRODUCT_ID = CP.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PD.PRODUCT_ID , COUNT(C.ID) AS cartCnt FROM TB_PRODUCT_DET PD JOIN TB_CART C ON C.PRODUCT_DET_ID = PD.ID AND C.CRE_TM >= #{fromDate} AND C.CRE_TM < #{toDate} AND C.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} WHERE PD.DEL_YN = 'N' GROUP BY PD.PRODUCT_ID ) C_AGG ON C_AGG.PRODUCT_ID = CP.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PVL.PRODUCT_ID , COUNT(PVL.ID) AS pageViewCnt FROM TB_PAGE_VIEW_LOG PVL WHERE PVL.IS_BOUNCE = 'N' AND PVL.SCROLL_DEPTH >= 30 AND PVL.CRE_TM >= #{fromDate} AND PVL.CRE_TM < #{toDate} GROUP BY PVL.PRODUCT_ID ) PVL_AGG ON PVL_AGG.PRODUCT_ID = CP.PRODUCT_ID WHERE PC.CODE_UPPER = 'P0001' AND PC.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND PC.DEL_YN = 'N' GROUP BY PC.ID, PC.CODE_NM ORDER BY totalScore DESC
